concept: Generous / Giving Freely / Abundant in Sharing
description: Ready to give more than is necessary or expected; showing kindness in sharing. 'Heloi' names the quality of open-handed giving—the heart that finds joy in sharing abundance.
sound_symbolism: The word gives freely. 'He' breathes outward, offering begun. 'Lo' flows with ease, giving without grasping. Finally 'i' completes with lightness, generosity fulfilled.
grammatical_notes: Functions as an adjective: 'heloi sila' (generous community). Related to 'lorua' (abundant) but emphasizes the act of sharing rather than having plenty. Neighbors: loa (give), phowe (share).

pillars.solarpunk-values: Generous systems share abundance rather than hoarding—communities where surplus flows to need.
pillars.secular-buddhist-philosophy: Generosity (dana) is the first perfection—the practice that loosens attachment and creates connection through giving.
